t_ch: 「开拓」知其不可，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
t_en: The Trailblaze knows it attempts the impossible. By this decree, it shall be ended!

t_ch: 即便如此，米哈伊尔也相信着明天。
t_en: Even so, Mikhail still believed in tomorrow.

t_ch: 现在，该成为新的「钟表匠」了。
t_en: Now, it's time to become the new "Watchmaker."

t_ch: 静止永远无法带来幸福。走吧，为十二时刻，安上罗盘的指针——
t_en: Standing still never brings happiness. Come on. Let's set the compass needle for the Twelve Hours...

t_ch: 唯有开拓前路，我们才能转动时间，予其意义。
t_en: Only by blazing a trail forward can we set time in motion and give it meaning.

t_ch: 美梦结束之后，明天才会到来。人们会继续向前，看到许许多多崭新的事物。
t_en: Only after the sweet dream ends will tomorrow come. People will keep moving forward, discovering countless new wonders.

t_ch: 在明天，人们会知道：<color=#dbc291ff>世界仍会迎来无数的美好，值得为之而战！</color>
t_en: Tomorrow, people will know that <color=#dbc291ff>the world will still welcome countless marvels worth fighting for!</color>

t_ch: 而止步不前的美梦，无法囚禁我们的愿望——
t_en: A stagnant sweet dream can't imprison our desires...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>愿此行，终抵群星！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>May this journey lead us starward!</color>

t_ch: 我以完美无缺的乐章号令——再创乐园！
t_en: With this perfect melody I command — recreate paradise anew!

t_ch: 「梦想之地」匹诺康尼
t_en: Penacony, Land of the Dreams

t_ch: 完
t_en: The End

t_ch: 知更鸟，是你在歌唱…？
t_en: Robin, is that you singing...?

t_ch: 星期日先生，你也该从梦中醒来了。匹诺康尼的未来，不会属于「秩序」…而是将由人的意志决定！
t_en: Mr. Sunday, it's time for you to wake up from your dream. The future of Penacony won't belong to the Order... but will be determined by human will!

t_ch: 「太一」的神力，竟然……
t_en: The divine power of Ena actually...

t_ch: 何妨，本就并非我意，我等便以人之姿，辨明「终论」！
t_en: So be it! It wasn't my intention anyway. Let us discern in human form the "Final Conclusion"!

t_ch: 神力辟世，神力仁爱？诸神，今时此地，尔等只需静听——
t_en: Did the gods create this world? Do the gods love all beings? O gods, you only need to hold your tongue here and silently harken...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>万物生长，自然而然。行至尽头——人世，亦应托于人手！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>All life shall grow as nature intended and reach its end. This mortal world... should rest in mortal hands!</color>

t_ch: 醒来吧，这场梦该结束了。
t_en: Wake up. It's time for this dream to end.

t_ch: 还没有结束，后来呢？
t_en: It's not over yet. What happened next?

t_ch: 那么，我为何会遗忘？
t_en: So why did I forget?

t_ch: 命运不允许我给出回答。而真正的结局…太过悲伤，我更希望你忘记它。
t_en: Destiny won't let me give you the answer, and the true ending... is too sad. I'd rather you forget about it.

t_ch: 我不会止步。
t_en: I won't stop here.

t_ch: 就连悲伤，我也会铭记。
t_en: I will carry even sorrow with me.

t_ch: 那么，我必须坦诚自己的最后一个谎言。
t_en: Well then, I must come clean about my final lie.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我没有给你看过任何人的记忆，包括我自己。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I never showed you anyone's memories, not even my own.</color>

t_ch: 你看到的，都是我机缘巧合得到的「剧本」，它记载了确切发生过的一切——而借助它的刺激，你竟真正以自己的视角走入回忆，将一切重新记起。
t_en: All you've seen is a "script" I came across by chance. It recorded everything that had happened, and using its stimulation, you actually managed to enter the memories from your own perspective and remember everything anew.

t_ch: 这能代表什么？
t_en: What does that mean?

t_ch: 代表你是不同的，唯一的，你做到了从未有人做过的事。
t_en: It means you're different, unique... You've done something no one has ever done before.

t_ch: 即使记忆已被焚烧殆尽，你却能再度将其回忆起来，重新珍藏于心。
t_en: Even though your memories were cremated to ashes, you were able to recall them once more, treasuring them once again in your heart.

t_ch: 星核猎手说，你是能转动时间，予其意义的人；你也是能够拨转命运，成全缺憾的人。
t_en: The Stellaron Hunters say you are the one who can turn the wheels of time and give it meaning, that you are the one who can alter destiny and make whole what is incomplete.

t_ch: 来吧，我想给你看些东西。
t_en: Come. I want to show you something.

t_ch: 这是我承诺给你的…关于「终末」的真相。
t_en: This is what I promised to give you... The truth about the Finality.

t_ch: 它并非艾利欧，而是「末王」的一缕神躯。
t_en: This cat is not Elio, but a strand of Terminus's divine corpus.

t_ch: 末王？
t_en: Terminus?

t_ch: 一缕？
t_en: A strand?

t_ch: 我也未曾见证过，这是星核猎手为我讲述的情景。当末王再度登神之时，祂将现出千手的神相，如此宣告——
t_en: The Stellaron Hunters described this scene to me, something I've never seen myself: When Terminus ascends to godhood once more, THEY will manifest their thousand-armed divine form, and proclaim...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「现在我成为了{RUBY_B#时间}终末{RUBY_E#}，高举时轮，毁灭世界。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Now I am become {RUBY_B#time}Finality{RUBY_E#}, lifting the wheel of time, the destroyer of worlds."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>此后，「末王」化身为漆黑的群猫，其中蕴含着全部的神力。它们将从世界的尽头出发，逆时而行，直至宇宙诞生的刹那。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Then, Terminus turned into a pack of black cats, distributing every ounce of THEIR divine power between those creatures. The cats shall depart from the end of the world, going against the river of time, till the moment of the universe's birth.</color>

t_ch: 而你所见到的，就是其中一只。艾利欧是更加特殊的存在，只有星核猎手知道他的真面目。
t_en: What you see is one of those cats. As for Elio, he is an even more special existence. Only the Stellaron Hunters know his true identity.

t_ch: 它为何会出现在这里？
t_en: What's the cat doing here?

t_ch: 我和它有什么渊源？
t_en: What connection do I have with the cat?

t_ch: 你还尚未回忆起的结局，它会告诉你真相——但你必须做好准备。
t_en: It will tell you the truth regarding the ending you haven't yet remembered... but you must be prepared.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>事实上，神主日陨落后，直到离开匹诺康尼，流萤都没有去见过任何人，包括你。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>What really happened is that Firefly didn't meet with anyone between the fall of The Great Septimus and when she left Penacony... Not even you.</color>

t_ch: 她知道「第三次死亡」会是多么悲惨，只敢远远地看着你，并在即将消散之时，独自躲了起来。
t_en: She knew how tragic her "third death" would be, so she only dared to watch you from afar and hid on her lonesome when she was about to fade away.

t_ch: 但悲伤的记忆也同样珍贵——<color=#dbc291ff>你若能坦然地接受分别，就能拥有创造重逢的力量。</color>
t_en: But even sad memories are precious. <color=#dbc291ff>If you can accept farewells with grace, then you'll gain the strength to create reunions.</color>

t_ch: 人们送别故人，要趁着他们仍能听见时，尽早哭泣——这样他们才能知道，自己被多少人爱着。
t_en: When you bid farewell to loved ones, you should cry while they can still hear you. That's the only way they'll know just how many people love them.

t_ch: 我会寻回，遗失的一切。
t_en: I will find everything that was lost.

t_ch: 我会证明，它们存在过。
t_en: I will prove that they existed.

t_ch: 开始吧。
t_en: Let's begin.

t_ch: 知道吗？我常常在想，自己此刻的所作所为，会否是「命运」无常的恩赐，我没有决定过什么，只是被它随意摆弄着。
t_en: You know, I often wonder if everything I'm doing right now is just a whimsical gift from "destiny." That I haven't really decided anything, but merely being tossed around at its mercy.

t_ch: 但此时此刻，我不在乎，<color=#dbc291ff>因为我的欣喜是真实的，我的悲伤是真实的。</color>
t_en: But right now? I don't care. <color=#dbc291ff>Because my joy is real. My sorrow is real.</color>

t_ch: 你也将会一样。记住，<color=#dbc291ff>若你有着非要弥补不可的遗憾，便在心底倾尽全力去呐喊，传至时间的尽头，让将要启程的「末王」听见。</color>
t_en: And you will be the same. Remember, <color=#dbc291ff>if you have regrets that must be mended, then shout with all your might from the depths of your heart. Let it be passed to the end of time and make Terminus, who is about to set off, hear your call.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你能看见这只黑猫，说明「末王」正在与你擦肩而过。其中一只的力量无法改变太多事，但你的过去，却是末王的未来。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The fact that you can see this black cat means Terminus is in the process of passing by you. The power of only one black cat cannot change much, but your past is Terminus's future.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>它若是记住你的声音，决定在自己的未来改变些什么，你的过去也将随之改变。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>If it remembers your voice and decides to change something in its own future, your past will change accordingly.</color>

t_ch: 或许，正因世界注定「破碎」，一位平凡的少女，才能得到她渴求的花束。
t_en: Perhaps it is because the world is destined to "shatter" that an ordinary girl can obtain the bouquet she yearns for.

t_ch: 去吧，亲手将那花束送出，让所有人不再遗憾。
t_en: Go forth and deliver that bouquet with your own hands, so that no one will be left with regrets.

t_ch: 但愿我们仍能重逢，{NICKNAME}…唯一能够取悦我的人啊。
t_en: I hope we'll meet again. {NICKNAME}... the only one who could ever please me.

t_ch: 父亲啊…毁灭绝非壮烈的一瞬，命运与记忆亦然。
t_en: Father... Destruction is not just a single glorious moment, and the same applies to destiny and memories.

t_ch: 「用漫天大火焚烧冬日的旷野，才能让那些毁不掉的事物重现。」
t_en: "Only by enkindling the winter wilderness with flames that cross the sky can we make the indestructible manifest once more."

t_ch: 「这是耕种者再造世界的经验，也是绘世者的空空妙手。」
t_en: "This is the experience from cultivators who had remade the world, and the wondrous creations from those who painted the world."

t_ch: 「他们坐在余烬中画下晨星，最为知晓：极度饥饿之时，群星才会旋转。」
t_en: "Sitting among the embers, they drew the morning star, knowing best: That only in times of extreme hunger do the stars begin to turn."

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>生命因何而沉睡？你{RUBY_B#已然}终将{RUBY_E#}找到，属于你自己的答案。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Why does life slumber? You {RUBY_B#already found}will eventually{RUBY_E#} find your own answer.</color>

t_ch: 自大的赌徒，我已经看穿了你的伎俩。
t_en: You arrogant gambler, I've already seen through your tricks.

t_ch: 哦？你倒是说说看？
t_en: Oh? Do tell me what you've figured out.

t_ch: 驾驶风帆穿越风暴的时候，醉鬼总会祈求命运的仁慈。
t_en: When sailing through storms, drunkards always beg for mercy from destiny.

t_ch: …所以呢？
都死了，命运最喜欢看他们触礁，愚人就该有愚人的下场。
t_en: So they all died. Destiny loves to watch them crash onto the reefs. A fool deserves a fool's end.

t_ch: 话里有话啊，教授…我可没那么有学问。
t_en: I feel like I need to read between the lines here, professor... But you know I'm not that well-read.

t_ch: 你根本不是好运，是你不当醉鬼，时刻清醒。
t_en: You're not lucky at all. You chose to forever remain sober, never becoming a drunkard.

t_ch: 哈——那就赌一把好了，走，今天正适合多喝几杯。等我真醉了，你就知道自己错得离谱。
t_en: Ha! Let's make an actual bet then! It's the perfect day for a few drinks. Once I'm actually drunk, you'll see just how wrong you are.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>但我也不在乎结果如何——在这世上，还有什么比「可能性」更宝贵？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>But I don't even care about the outcome... In this world, what could be more precious than "possibilities"?</color>

t_ch: 所以…你们还是不欢迎我的加入？
t_en: So... you still don't want me to join?

t_ch: 这是艾利欧的决定。
t_en: That's Elio's decision.

t_ch: 他看见了我的未来？
t_en: He saw my future?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>加入星核猎手的所有可能里，你最终都会选择背叛。以「须臾」之名，成为毁灭「记忆」的绝灭大君。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>In all possible futures where you join the Stellaron Hunters, you will ultimately choose betrayal. You shall become a Lord Ravager named "Ephemera," poised to destroy the Remembrance.</color>

t_ch: ——艾利欧的原话，也是给你的报酬。
t_en: ...Those were Elio's exact words and your payment.

t_ch: …报酬？
t_en: ...Payment?

t_ch: 一切结束之后，我们想让你烧掉一些{NICKNAME}的记忆。
t_en: After everything is over, we want you to burn some of {NICKNAME}'s memories.

t_ch: …我能知道原因吗？
t_en: ...May I know why?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>{F#她}{M#他}不能带着这些记忆前往下一站，这会让{F#她}{M#他}太早招来「毁灭」的注意，死在那里。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>{F#She}{M#He} can't head to the next stop with these memories. It would draw the Destruction's attention to {F#her}{M#him} too early, and {F#she}{M#he}'d die there.</color>

t_ch: 我可以这样做，但迟早有一天，我会重新还给{F#她}{M#他}——以我自己的方式。
t_en: I can do that, but I'll give the memories back to {M#him}{F#her} sooner or later... in my own way.

t_ch: 无论你们会不会阻止。
t_en: Whether you try to stop me or not.

t_ch: …没人会，「剧本」已经写下了那一天。
t_en: ...No one will stop you. It is already written in the "script."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那会是一个新的起点，「四末」会因此汇向「毁灭」，而银河会携起手，将其跨越。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>It will be a new beginning. The "Four Apocalypses" will converge towards the Destruction because of it, while the cosmos will join hands to overcome that annihilation.</color>

t_ch: …焚烧？
t_en: ...Burnt?

t_ch: 是啊，就像砂金先生那时一样，你拔刀的那一刻，虚无浸染了梦境。
t_en: Yes, just like with Mr. Aventurine back then. Nihility infected the Dreamscape the moment you drew your blade.

t_ch: 还好这是梦境的世界，康士坦丝将所有的「无」承接到了自己身上，全部烧却了。
t_en: Thankfully, this is the world within the dreamscape. Constance took all the "naught" upon herself and burned it away completely.

t_ch: 或许她…很长时间都无法完全恢复。
t_en: Perhaps... she won't be able to fully recover for a long time.

t_ch: …我很抱歉。
t_en: ...I'm very sorry.

t_ch: 不，她现在还有其他要紧事，所以才拜托我来见你——她很想向你道谢。
t_en: Don't be. She's got other pressing matters right now. That's why she asked me to meet you... She really wants to thank you.

t_ch: 她背叛过太多人，每一刻都面临着寻仇者的杀机，她曾乐于在死亡中起舞……
t_en: She's betrayed too many people, facing death threats from avengers at every moment. She used to delight in dancing with death...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>可在烧却「虚无」的那一刻，她说自己正在绽放，第一次…品味到活着的喜悦。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>But at the moment she burned away the Nihility, she said she was blooming. She said that, for the first time... she felt the joy of being alive.</color>

t_ch: 如此说来…人们都觉得大丽花的花语是「背叛」，可最初发现它的那颗星球上，那里的人们认为，<color=#dbc291ff>大丽花象征着「生机与繁荣」。</color>
t_en: Come to think of it... People all believe that the dahlia's floriography means "betrayal," but on the planet where it was first discovered, the locals saw it as <color=#dbc291ff>a symbol of "life and prosperity."</color>

t_ch: 创造一条前所未有的命途，真够惊人的。
t_en: Creating a brand-new Path... That's truly astonishing.

t_ch: 那么，作为他的妹妹，你应该猜得到吧？倘若他真能做到，那会是一条怎样的命途？
t_en: You must have some ideas as his sister, right? If he really managed to do it, what kind of Path would that be?

t_ch: 我想…那是一场「开拓」之间的对决吧。
t_en: I think... It must've been a battle between different kinds of the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 只是哥哥他…得出了一个错误的答案，<color=#dbc291ff>他有着「开拓」的初心，走上的道路却名为「统治」，名为「征服」。</color>
t_en: However, my brother came to the wrong conclusion... <color=#dbc291ff>His original aspiration was similar to the Trailblaze, yet the road he walked was one named the "domination"... or the "conquest."</color>

t_ch: 就算一个人的愿望，是希望所有人都能幸福，那也是一个自私的愿望。
t_en: Even if someone wishes for everyone's happiness, that's still a selfish wish.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>总有人不希望「被拯救」，他们想要「自己拯救自己」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>There will always be those who don't want to "be saved," who want to "save themselves."</color>

t_ch: 你同样认为…世上不应该存在「神」？
t_en: Do you also think... that there shouldn't be any "god" in this world?

t_ch: 不，哪怕是全无作为的神，至少也能让许多人寄托心灵，得到安慰。
t_en: No. Even a god who does nothing can at least give people something to believe in and find comfort in.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>但这个世界上，一定不再需要人的君王。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>But this world definitely no longer needs a king of humankind.</color>

t_ch: 正因如此，我相信哥哥总有一天，也能想清楚这一切。他犯下过错误，已被制止。我不希望他在监牢中度过余生，<color=#dbc291ff>我想让他…也得到自己拯救自己的机会。</color>
t_en: That's why I believe my brother will come to understand all of this one day as well. He made mistakes, but he was stopped. I don't want him to spend the rest of his life in prison. <color=#dbc291ff>I want him to... also have a chance to save himself.</color>

t_ch: 难怪你会来找我。
t_en: No wonder you came looking for me.

t_ch: 嗯，我想和你做一笔交易。然后…我们来谈谈吧——在公司面前，匹诺康尼将会处于何种位置。
t_en: Yes. I want to make a deal with you, and after that... we'll talk about what position Penacony will hold before the IPC.

t_ch: 可是…流萤呢？似乎哪里都没见到过她……
t_en: But... where's Firefly? I haven't seen her anywhere...

t_ch: 我找到你了，流萤。
t_en: I found you, Firefly.

t_ch: 我来陪你把梦做完了。
t_en: I'm here to see your dream through with you.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}？你怎么知道我在这里……
t_en: {NICKNAME}? How did you know I was here...

t_ch: 你的身体怎么样了？
t_en: How are you feeling?

t_ch: 还好啦……
t_en: I'm doing okay...

t_ch: 我一直在等你找我。
t_en: I've been waiting for you to come find me.

t_ch: 抱歉，我不是故意想躲着你。
t_en: Sorry. I wasn't trying to avoid you.

t_ch: 但我有自己的理由，可以就让我自己留在这吗？
t_en: But I have my own reasons. Can you just let me stay here by myself?

t_ch: 不，我知道这是一个约定。
t_en: No. I know this was a promise.

t_ch: 好，我们就在这里告别吧。
t_en: Alright. Let's say our goodbyes here.

t_ch: 谢谢你，我们一定能够再见的。
t_en: Thank you. I'm sure we'll meet again.

t_ch: 其实，还有一些关于你的事，我总觉得自己应该告诉你。
t_en: Actually, there are some things about you I feel I should tell you.

t_ch: 但我不想让你惹上麻烦，抱歉。
t_en: But I don't want to get you into trouble. Sorry.

t_ch: 不，我必须完成约定。
t_en: No. I must keep my promise.

t_ch: 再见，流萤。
t_en: Goodbye, Firefly.

t_ch: 你注意到，她会时不时将余光投向你。
t_en: You notice that she glances over at you once in a while.

t_ch: 不，我必须完成约定。
t_en: No. I must keep my promise.

t_ch: 再见，流萤。
t_en: Goodbye, Firefly.

t_ch: 你不禁思索，她的拒绝，真的像是表面上那样决绝吗？
t_en: You can't help but wonder... Was her refusal really as determined as she made it appear?

t_ch: 不，我必须完成约定。
t_en: No. I must keep my promise.

t_ch: 再见，流萤。
t_en: Goodbye, Firefly.

t_ch: 我相信，有一天你会自己找到这来的，不够好奇，就不可能成为无名客。
t_en: I believe that one day you'll find your way here on your own. After all, you can't become one of the Nameless without enough curiosity.

t_ch: 你有资格知道这一切。而到了那时，你已经拥有了面对未来的勇气，而潜在的危险也早已过去。
t_en: You deserve to know it all. And by then, you'll have the courage to face the future, and the potential dangers will be long gone.

t_ch: 听着…<color=#dbc291ff>你是注定{RUBY_B#跨越}带来{RUBY_E#}「终末」的人。</color>
t_en: Listen... <color=#dbc291ff>you are the one who is destined to {RUBY_B#transcend}bring about{RUBY_E#} the Finality.</color>

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>只有你能知道，只有你能决定。这片银河，的确不是只为你而存在，也不是只在你的注视下流淌…但它永远等待着你的{RUBY_B#超越}拯救{RUBY_E#}。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Only you can know it and only you can decide. This cosmos certainly doesn't exist solely for you, nor does it flow only under your gaze... But it's forever waiting for you {RUBY_B#to surpass}to save{RUBY_E#} it.</color>

t_ch: 你怎么会知道「约定」？我明明没有说过……
t_en: How did you know about "the promise"? I never mentioned it...

t_ch: 命运是很奇妙的。
t_en: Destiny works in mysterious ways.

t_ch: 不要小看我的情报网。
t_en: Don't underestimate my intel network.

t_ch: 也许不仅奇妙，还很温柔吧。
t_en: Maybe it's not just mysterious, but also gentle.

t_ch: 好像我还没提到过？来这里之前，我在手账里记录下了所有要做的事——我待在这里，是想完成里面的最后一个心愿。
t_en: I don't think I've mentioned it, but I wrote down everything I wanted to do in my journal before coming here. I'm staying here because I want to fulfill the last wish written in it.

t_ch: 不过，我跟在你身后，偷偷看了你很久，还是不想打扰你。我希望你的梦…能笑着开始，也能笑着醒来。
t_en: I've been quietly following you and watching you from afar for a while, but I still didn't want to disturb you. I hope your dreams... begin with a smile and end with one too.

t_ch: 最后一个愿望是什么？
t_en: What's your last wish?

t_ch: 你现在想去哪里？
t_en: Where do you want to go now?

t_ch: 当然是去看烟花，据说，匹诺康尼有一艘很大的飞艇，在那里看到的烟花，非常值得打卡。
t_en: To see the fireworks, of course. I heard there's this huge airship in Penacony where you can get an absolutely photo-worthy view of the fireworks.

t_ch: 那么……
t_en: So...

t_ch: 我们就去看烟花吧！
t_en: Let's go watch the fireworks!

t_ch: 确实是很合适的地方…{NICKNAME}，你眼光很好呢。
t_en: It really is the perfect spot... {NICKNAME}, you've got great taste.

t_ch: 我善于寻找美好的存在。
t_en: I have a knack for finding beautiful things.

t_ch: 你不懂，我有指引线。
t_en: You don't get it. I've got a quest marker.

t_ch: 无论如何，谢谢。好像还没开始，我们先坐一会儿吧。
t_en: Either way, thank you. Looks like it hasn't started yet. Let's sit for a while.

t_ch: 所有人在这种时候，是不是都说不出话？
t_en: I wonder whether everyone feels speechless at times like this.

t_ch: 有点紧张？
t_en: Nervous?

t_ch: 没想到话题？
t_en: Can't think of what to say?

t_ch: 也许都不是。我倒是听说过一个说法，一直都很喜欢。
t_en: Maybe it's neither. There's a saying that I always liked.

t_ch: 对于想要见到的人，人们总是在见面前，不断想象那时的情景，想象自己在见面时说出的话，能让对方露出笑容。
t_en: When it comes to someone we want to meet, we always imagine the scene before it happens, imagine the words we'll say that would make them smile.

t_ch: 慢慢地，所有想说的话，还没有相见之前，就已经说完了。
t_en: Slowly but surely, all the things we want to say would have already been said before we even met the person.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>而在真正重逢的那一刻，你会发现，对方比你的一切想象还要美好——可一时之间，你又想不出怎么夸奖对方了。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And when we finally meet again, we realize they're even more beautiful than anything we could have imagined... Yet at that moment, we find ourselves at a loss for words to express just how amazing they really are.</color>

t_ch: 我想知道，你和我过去的故事。
t_en: I want to know our story from the past.

t_ch: 你为什么如此在意我？
t_en: Why do you care so much about me?

t_ch: …抱歉，我不能说。艾利欧告诉我，那会导致很可怕的未来，我仅仅是多说几句，就会让你在下一站死去。
t_en: ...I'm sorry, but I can't tell you. Elio told me that it would lead to a terrible future. If I say even a few words more, you'll die at the next stop.

t_ch: 我能够告诉你的，只有我们重逢的原因。
t_en: All I can tell you is why our paths crossed again.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>很久以前，你答应过我：如果我能做梦，你会让它成为一个美好的白日梦。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Long ago, you promised me that if I could dream, then you would make it a beautiful daydream.</color>

t_ch: 可我已经忘记了一切…
t_en: But I've forgotten everything...

t_ch: 我还算你认识的那个人吗？
t_en: Am I... still the person you once knew?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>重要的不是他们变成什么样子，而是你仍然对他们抱有同一份真实的感情。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>What matters isn't how they've changed, but that you still hold those same genuine feelings for them.</color>

t_ch: 的确，曾让少女万分珍重的，若非失却，就是已然改换了面貌。可她的微笑并未褪去，如同她在面对命运时一般——
t_en: Indeed, what the girl once cherished dearly was her appearance that, if not lost, had changed. Yet, her smile never faded, just like when she faced destiny...

t_ch: …抱歉。
t_en: ...I'm sorry.

t_ch: …你没事吧？
t_en: ...Are you okay?

t_ch: …失熵症？
t_en: ...Entropy Loss Syndrome?

t_ch: 是啊，其实…「剧本」里说的三次死亡，我还有一次没有经历。
t_en: Yeah. Actually... I still haven't experienced one of the three deaths written in the "script."

t_ch: …哪一次？
t_en: ...Which one?

t_ch: …所以你才自己待着？
t_en: ...So that's why you've been keeping to yourself?

t_ch: 我也是在太一之梦消散后，才刚刚意识到。之前是我误会了，被「死亡」送入流梦礁，根本不能算是一次死亡，那未免太轻松了。
t_en: I only realized it after Ena's Dream dissipated. I've made a mistake. Being sent to the Dreamflux Reef by "Death" could hardly be called a death at all. That would've been way too easy.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>真正的三次死亡，第一次…我早就知道真相。我没有做梦的机能，醒来后，就再也无法入梦。也就是说，梦中的我将会彻底不复存在。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>As for the true three deaths, the first one... I've known its true form for a long time. I can't dream. After I woke up, I would never dream again. In other words, the me that exists in this dream would completely cease to exist.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>第二次，是寰宇蝗灾杀死了我，我启用了自己真正的力量，死而复生。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The second time, I was killed by the Swarm Disaster. I activated my true power and came back from death.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>但那力量，必然将导致第三次——我的症状会不可抑制地加快，失熵而死。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>But that power would inevitably lead me to the third death... My symptoms would accelerate uncontrollably until I die of entropy loss.</color>

t_ch: 我们来到匹诺康尼时，梦境就已经开始与现实融合了。我以为自己在做梦，但同时，也行走于清醒的现实——这一样会让失熵症继续恶化。
t_en: The dreamscape had already started merging with reality when we arrived in Penacony. I thought I was dreaming, but I was actually also living in waking reality. It was causing my Entropy Loss Syndrome to worsen.

t_ch: 不过你别担心，我问过银狼了，现实里不会这么严重，就先不聊这些了。
t_en: But don't worry. I asked Silver Wolf about it, and she said things won't get that serious in real life. Let's not talk about this anymore.

t_ch: 我就怕你露出悲伤的表情——这是我们最美好的白日梦，我们要笑着把它做完。
t_en: I just don't want to see you looking sad. This is our most beautiful daydream, and we should see it through with smiles on our faces.

t_ch: 毕竟，我们永远不会知道，从哪一瞬间起，我们就用完了…与某个人在这片银河间所有地方共有的…所有时间。
t_en: After all... we never know when we will use up all the moments we have with someone across all space and time.

t_ch: 对了，{NICKNAME}…你可不可以闭上眼睛？
t_en: Hey, {NICKNAME}... could you close your eyes?

t_ch: 如果是唯一一次做梦，我希望…你能看到最好的我。
t_en: If this is my only chance to dream, then I want you... to see the best version of me.

t_ch: 在快要结束的时候，就让我稍微完美主义一下下吧。
t_en: As we near the end, let me indulge in a bit of perfectionism.

t_ch: 像我以前常常做的那样，闭上眼睛，去想象我们待在一起的景象…<color=#dbc291ff>就算看不见我，但你还是可以知道，我们的距离从未遥远过。</color>
t_en: Just like what I used to do, let's close our eyes and imagine ourselves being together... <color=#dbc291ff>Even if you can't see me, you'll still know that we've never been far apart.</color>

t_ch: （闭上眼睛）
t_en: (closes eyes)

t_ch: 你不许偷偷离开。
t_en: Don't you dare sneak away.

t_ch: 不会的，只要我能做到，就永远不会。
t_en: I won't. I promise to stay as long as I can.

t_ch: 嗯…我想想…该从哪里开始呢……
t_en: Hmm... let me think... where should we start...

t_ch: 对啦，当然要从「开始的地方」开始。
t_en: Right. We should start "where everything began," of course.

t_ch: 就在黄金的时刻，你来救我的时候——
t_en: Right at that Golden Hour, when you came to save me...

t_ch: 不过，也可以假设我们素不相识，只是偶然在那里相遇。
t_en: That being said, we could also pretend we're strangers who just happened to meet there.

t_ch: 我嘛…是一个来黄金时刻旅行的学生，最好零花钱能稍稍多一点…然后我出现在那里时，打扮得也要精致一点。
t_en: Me... I'm a student traveling to the Golden Hour, and it'd be nice if I had a bit more pocket money... Oh, and when I show up there, I should dress up a little fancier.

t_ch: 你…你也是学生！但却是从好远好远的一颗星球上来到这里，完全不熟悉环境。
t_en: And you... You're a student too! But you came here from a really, really distant planet, completely unfamiliar with your surroundings.

t_ch: 然后，就跳出来几个好凶好凶的流氓，想要欺负你。
t_en: Then, a bunch of mean-looking thugs jumped out, trying to pick on you.

t_ch: 而那时候，我会挺身而出——对，这一次，让我来拯救你。
t_en: When that happens, I'll step up to the plate. Yeah! Let me be the one to save you this time.

t_ch: 我们打不过的，还是一起跑吧。
t_en: We can't beat them. Let's run away together.

t_ch: 别管我，不想让你因我受伤。
t_en: Don't worry about me. I don't want you getting hurt because of me.

t_ch: 咱们干嘛不一起上？
t_en: Why don't we team up and fight together?

t_ch: 没关系，我就是要那样做。
t_en: No worries. That's exactly what I'm going to do.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>结果并不重要，甚至过程也不重要。重要的是：我们怎样参与这趟旅程，又如何去看待它。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The result doesn't matter, and even the process isn't important. What matters is how we take part in this journey and how we choose to view it.</color>

t_ch: 所以，{NICKNAME}，再答应我一个愿望……
t_en: So, {NICKNAME}, grant me one more wish...

t_ch: 还记得吗？在对抗「太一之梦」的时候，我抱着你飞上天空。那时，我不知道自己还能否醒来，但我却很开心。
t_en: Remember how I held you and flew into the sky when we fought against Ena's Dream? Back then, I wasn't sure if I would ever wake up again, but I was happy.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>因为，我们又能肩并肩，去对抗某些我们认为「不对」的东西，并且，能为对方不顾一切。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>We were standing shoulder to shoulder once again, fighting against things we believed were "wrong," and we'd do anything for each other.</color>

t_ch: 不过，我还是有一点小小的私心——我相信你不会忘记这一幕，但如果回想起来，我想让它轻松一点。
t_en: Still, I have a tiny, selfish wish. I know you won't forget this moment, but when you look back on it, I want it to feel lighter.

t_ch: 也许没有什么敌人，一切只是场恶作剧。而我抱着你飞上天空时，天空中不是可怕的虫群，而是…我没能看到的烟花。
t_en: Maybe there were no enemies at all. It was all just a prank. And when I carried you up into the heavens, what we saw there wasn't the terrifying Swarm, but rather... the fireworks that I never got to see.

t_ch: 你能看到烟花的。
t_en: You'll be able to see the fireworks.

t_ch: 我会像你想要的那样，记住你。
t_en: I'll remember you just the way you want me to.

t_ch: 你已经看到了啊，笨蛋！
t_en: You've already seen it, you dummy!

t_ch: 流萤？
t_en: Firefly?

t_ch: 我要睁眼了哦？
t_en: I'm gonna open my eyes.

t_ch: …流萤？！
t_en: ...Firefly!?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…艾利欧说，我们注定走向不同的终末，不可能拥有未来。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... Elio said we're destined to head to different finalities, that we can't have a future.

t_ch: 所以你说，你会给我一个，比任何结局都美好的白日梦。
t_en: That's why you told me that you'll give me a daydream more beautiful than any ending could ever be.

t_ch: 我很期待…但是，我们难道真的就不能，一起跨过那个结局吗？
t_en: I'm looking forward to it, but... can we really... not step over that ending together?

t_ch: 我不害怕死…但不要让我独自一人死去……
t_en: I'm not scared of death... but please, don't let me die alone...

t_ch: 他们都说…<color=#dbc291ff>你是注定{RUBY_B#跨越}带来{RUBY_E#}「终末」的人。</color>
t_en: They say... <color=#dbc291ff>you're destined to {RUBY_B#transcend}bring about{RUBY_E#} the Finality.</color>

t_ch: 但相信你会在的…一定会……
t_en: But I believe you'll be there... You definitely will...

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>只有你能知道，只有你能决定。这片银河，的确不是只为你而存在，也不是只在你的注视下流淌…但它永远等待着你的{RUBY_B#超越}拯救{RUBY_E#}。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Only you can know it and only you can decide. This cosmos certainly doesn't exist solely for you, nor does it flow only under your gaze... But it's forever waiting for you {RUBY_B#to surpass}to save{RUBY_E#} it.</color>

t_ch: 「罹患失熵症的人，物理结构会陷入不可逆的慢性解离，慢慢消失。你依旧能跑、能跳、能和他人交流。一切看起来都那么正常，只不过你总是比别人慢一点点……」
t_en: "Those afflicted with the Entropy Loss Syndrome will experience an irreversible chronic dissolution of their physical form, gradually fading away. You can still run, jump, and talk with others. Everything seems normal, except you're always just a little slower than everyone else..."

t_ch: 「直到自己和整个世界的轮廓都变得模糊不清。你分不清现实和梦境，因为它们变得同样破碎。」
t_en: "Until the outlines of yourself and the entire world blur into obscurity. You can no longer distinguish reality from dreams, for both have become equally fractured."

t_ch: 她就要走到失熵的尽头，思维已然先一步支离破碎。
t_en: She is nearing the end stage of the Entropy Loss, her mind already splintered first.

t_ch: 而在她逐渐忘记一切时，关于你的故事，是直到最后才消失的部分。
t_en: And as she gradually forgot everything, the story of you was the last to fade.

t_ch: 就算如此，你也是到最后，才会忘记我……
t_en: Even so, I'll still be the last thing you forget...

t_ch: 解离尚未结束。而眼下的这个瞬间，她的脑海中就只剩下「一个名字」，和「一个心愿」。
t_en: The dissolution is not yet over. And in this very instant, her mind holds only "one name" and "one wish."

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…烟花……
t_en: {NICKNAME}... Fireworks...

t_ch: （不，趁着她也许还能看见……）
t_en: (No. While she might still be able to see it...)

t_ch: 握着她的手，完成她的愿望。
t_en: Hold her hand and fulfill her wish.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>结果并不重要，甚至过程也不重要。重要的是：我们怎样参与这趟旅程，又如何去看待它。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The result doesn't matter, and even the process isn't important. What matters is how we take part in this journey and how we choose to view it.</color>

t_ch: 答应你的，我都会做到。
t_en: I'll do everything I promised you.

t_ch: 然而流萤的目光再也没有移动过——她眼中的神采，已然完全消失了。
t_en: However, Firefly's eyes never move again. Every spark of life in her eyes has already gone.

t_ch: 我…还是慢了一步吗……
t_en: Am I... still one step too late...

t_ch: 为时已晚——你情愿用她想要的方式将她记住，在你的脑海里，结局会是美好的。
t_en: It is too late. You would rather remember her in the way she wished, and in your mind, the ending would be a happy one.

t_ch: 但她回想今天，总会发觉一处遗憾，永远无法弥补。
t_en: But when she looks back on this day, she will always discover one regret that can never be mended.

t_ch: 为什么……
t_en: Why...

t_ch: 人群喧闹起来，烟火将要开始了——
t_en: The crowd buzzes with excitement and the fireworks are about to light up the sky...

t_ch: 可流萤已经看不见了……
t_en: But Firefly can't see it anymore...

t_ch: 而风中传来歌谣——
t_en: And a song comes on the wind...

t_ch: 「♪因为她永远不在了～♪♪～她就会更清晰吗？」
t_en: "♪ Will she be clearer~ ♪♪~ because she is gone forever?"

t_ch: 「♪你送给我的花束～♪♪～它们花瓣凋落时的声音，能让我一直醒着吗？」
t_en: "♪ The bouquet you gave me~ ♪♪~ can the sound of its petals falling keep me awake always?"

t_ch: 不，不是无法弥补……
t_en: No... It's not beyond saving...

t_ch: 我能够拨转命运，成全缺憾。世界给我们的命运，立下一个终点，那它至少，要补偿给流萤…她想要的花束。
t_en: I can change the course of destiny and make up for what's missing. If the world has set an endpoint for our destiny, then at the very least... it owes Firefly the bouquet she wanted.

t_ch: 你感到耳边的声音开始渐渐模糊，消去——
t_en: The voice at your ear blurs, then fades into silence...

t_ch: 你回忆起记忆中的烟花，流萤接住正从空中坠落的你，带你飞上天际。在那时，她曾说过的话，给故事留下了完美的注脚——属于她，也属于夜空下的所有人。
t_en: You recall the fireworks in your memory, where Firefly caught you as you fell from the sky and carried you up into the heavens. At that moment, the words she spoke left a perfect footnote for the story, one belonging to her, and to everyone under the night sky.

t_ch: 而你知道，如今这已是不复存在的注脚。
t_en: And you know that this footnote no longer exists.

t_ch: 「终末」的力量正在拨转时间，而少女最后的遗憾近在眼前。「一个美好的白日梦」——诺言兑现的时刻到了。你能，你会，你必将…使其实现。
t_en: The power of Finality is turning back time, and the girl's final regret is within sight. "A beautiful daydream..." The moment to fulfill that promise has come. You can, you will, you must... make it a reality.

t_ch: …艾利欧？
t_en: ...Elio?

t_ch: 那么，去把遗忘的一切，重新找回来吧。
t_en: Then, let's go reclaim everything that was forgotten.

t_ch: 对了，康士坦丝的秘密据点，是不是还能在匹诺康尼找到来着？
t_en: Oh right. Wasn't Constance's secret stronghold still somewhere in Penacony?

t_ch: 就现在？也太着急了吧！
t_en: Right now? Talk about being impulsive!

t_ch: 确定要从梦中醒来吗？
t_en: Are you sure you wish to wake up from your dream?

t_ch: 醒来。
t_en: Wake up.

t_ch: 还有要做的事。
t_en: There are still things to do.

t_ch: 开始跃迁
t_en: Begin Warp Jump

t_ch: （这样人就到齐了，去集合吧。）
t_en: (Now that everyone's here, I should go join them.)

t_ch: （帕姆出现了，要开航线会议了吧？）
t_en: (Hmm? {M#It's }Pom-Pom. Time for our navigation meeting?)

t_ch: 各位乘客请稍候，航线会议马上开始。
t_en: Please stand by, passengers. The navigation meeting will be starting soon!

t_ch: 黑天鹅不参加吗？
t_en: Black Swan isn't joining us?

t_ch: 她说自己只是个搭车客，不该干涉航路去向，会在派对车厢等待结果。
t_en: She doesn't think it's right to join in on our vote when she's only hitchhiking with us, so she's waiting in the Party Car.

t_ch: 另外，那位忆者还补了句——相信各位一定会选择「翁法罗斯」。
t_en: Though she did say that she believes we'll end up deciding on Amphoreus.

t_ch: 被她看穿了。
t_en: She can read our minds!

t_ch: 不能让她得逞。
t_en: Let's prove her wrong.

t_ch: 呵呵，大家心里自有答案。
t_en: I'm sure everyone has a destination in mind.

t_ch: 星期日呢？
t_en: Where's Sunday?

t_ch: 他无意参与航线会议，去派对车厢休息了。
t_en: He isn't joining us for the navigation meeting. He went to the Party Car to rest.

t_ch: 不用担心，对星期日而言，一处意料之外的目的地会是个不错的起点。
t_en: Don't worry about him. An unexpected destination could be a great starting point for Sunday.

t_ch: 没必要担心他。
t_en: I'm not worrying about him.

t_ch: 呵呵，不知他听到这句话，是该高兴还是该失落呢。
t_en: I can't decide if he'll be happy or disappointed to hear that.

t_ch: 送去公司手里吧！
t_en: Send him back to the IPC, then!

t_ch: 那的确意料之外，还是算了吧。
t_en: That's unexpected, alright... but let's not do that.

t_ch: 他还挺有松弛感。
t_en: He's pretty laid-back about this, huh.

t_ch: 你会用这个词形容他，倒是在我的意料之外了。
t_en: Laid-back? That's... not exactly a word I associate with him.

t_ch: 让控制狂彻底失控！
t_en: Let the control freak lose all control!

t_ch: 呵呵，我可没这么说。
t_en: Your words, not mine.

t_ch: 送去洗车星吧！
t_en: Send him to a Washtopia!

t_ch: 那的确意料之外，还是算了吧。
t_en: That's unexpected, alright... but let's not do that.

t_ch: 他还挺有松弛感。
t_en: He's pretty laid-back about this, huh.

t_ch: 你会用这个词形容他，倒是在我的意料之外了。
t_en: Laid-back? That's... not exactly a word I associate with him.

t_ch: 开始决定目的地吧。
t_en: Let's start voting on our destination.

t_ch: 既然大家都准备好了，我先列下几个选项：首先是<color=#dbc291ff>「海洋星球」露莎卡</color>。
t_en: Since everyone's here, Pom-Pom will start presenting our options. First up is <color=#dbc291ff>the oceanic planet of Lushaka</color>.

t_ch: 那里是米哈伊尔先生的故乡。露莎卡曾受星核影响，全球海平面上升，不知现在变成什么样了。
t_en: Mr. Mikhail's homeworld. Lushaka was hit by rising sea levels after the Stellaron Disaster, though I'm not sure how things are on the planet now.

t_ch: 然后是<color=#dbc291ff>「玛瑙世界」梅露丝坦因</color>。
t_en: Next, we have <color=#dbc291ff>Melustanin, the Agate World</color>.

t_ch: 「纯美」伊德莉拉的飞升之地，永存不灭之美的世界。据说那里是星核之灾的原爆点之一，多半不怎么安全。
t_en: That's where Idrila the Beauty ascended, a world of undying allure. It's also said to be one of the initial sites of the Stellaron Disaster. Probably not the safest choice.

t_ch: 考虑到{RUBY_B#开拓力}列车燃料{RUBY_E#}问题，这趟出行最好计划得周密些。
t_en: Given the {RUBY_B#Trailblaze Power}Express' fuel{RUBY_E#} situation, it's worth us thinking through our options carefully.

t_ch: 最后，也是最大胆的选项——<color=#dbc291ff>「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」</color>。
t_en: And finally, the most adventurous option: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land, Amphoreus</color>.

t_ch: 阿基维利也没去过的世界，智库里一点资料都没有…但如果这趟「开拓」成功，燃料问题就解决了！
t_en: A planet not recorded in the data bank and a world even Akivili has never set foot on... But if this trailblazing expedition works out, it could solve our fuel problem!

t_ch: 列车要变永动机了？
t_en: The Express can soon achieve perpetual motion?

t_ch: 没那么简单，但至少短期内，列车长不用再为行程延误发愁了。
t_en: It's not that simple. But we can save Pom-Pom from worrying about service delays, at least for a foreseeable period of time.

t_ch: 情况特殊，感觉也没得选。
t_en: We don't really have a choice in a time like this, do we?

t_ch: 没人想去江户星吗？
t_en: No one wants to go to Edo Star?

t_ch: 那里前不久刚遭遇反物质军团袭击。根据公司说法，敌人已经被击退了，但江户星暂时关闭了通行权。没什么我们能做的事。
t_en: They suffered an ambush by the Antimatter Legion some time ago. According to the IPC, the enemy was repelled, but Edo Star placed their planet on temporary lockdown. I'm afraid there's nothing we can do there.

t_ch: 没人想去洗车星吗？
t_en: No one wants to go to a Washtopia?

t_ch: 哎呀别捣乱了，列车干净得很，不用做大扫除啦。
t_en: Geez, stop messing around. We don't need a scrub. The Express is already spotlessly clean.

t_ch: 果然比起其他选项，翁法罗斯还是多了个非去不可的理由啊……
t_en: Amphoreus does have something to offer, unlike the other options...

t_ch: 而且，那是一个完全未知的世界哎，还有什么比它更适合「开拓」？
t_en: Plus, it's a completely unknown world! What better place to trailblaze?

t_ch: 我的看法也一样。虽说前路未卜，但另外两个站点也谈不上多么安全。既然都要冒险，不如大胆一点。
t_en: I feel the same. While we know nothing about Amphoreus, we know the other two worlds aren't exactly safe options. Anyway, if it's a risk we're taking, we might as well throw in some adventure for good measure.

t_ch: 同意。
t_en: Agreed.

t_ch: 果然大家都倾向星图中不曾描绘的世界啊，列车真是吸引了一群意气相投的伙伴。
t_en: So, everyone's leaning toward the uncharted world? It seems we've got a crew of like-minded adventurers on the Express.

t_ch: ——当然，我的答案也是翁法罗斯。
t_en: That includes me, too. I'm for Amphoreus.

t_ch: 看来列车长预先准备的投票方案，已经不需要了帕。
t_en: Looks like Pom-Pom's voting plan won't be needed, after all!

t_ch: 那我正式宣布：下一站——翁法罗斯！
t_en: It's official, then. Our next stop is... Amphoreus!

t_ch: 好诶！那就等列车长的跃迁通知啦。
t_en: Great! I'm looking forward to the conductor's jump announcement!

t_ch: 本姑娘先回房间一趟，给相机清点储存空间！这回要美美拍照。
t_en: I'll be in my room, freeing up some memory on my camera~! I'm going to have to snap tons of pretty pictures this time!

t_ch: 也把这个「好消息」带给黑天鹅小姐吧。
t_en: Don't forget to share the good news with Miss Black Swan.

t_ch: （我也去检查下行李吧，或者再和大家聊聊？）
t_en: (I'd better start packing up, too. Or should I go chat some more with the others?)

t_ch: 「开拓」也未曾抵达的世界——对无名客而言，是个难以抵御的诱惑吧？
t_en: A world yet to be explored by the Trailblaze... No self-respecting Nameless would turn that opportunity down.

t_ch: 这种机会很难得吗？
t_en: An opportunity hard to come by?

t_ch: 当然。星穹列车一直沿着阿基维利开辟的银轨行驶，正常情况下，是没有办法前往「开拓」认知外的世界的。
t_en: Absolutely. The Astral Express has always traveled along the silver rail laid down by Akivili. We don't normally get to venture into a world beyond the knowledge of the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 我比星神还厉害了！
t_en: Hah! So I'm better than an Aeon!

t_ch: 那可是阿基维利，祂的每一站都是人类未曾抵达的世界。列车一直沿着祂开辟的银轨行驶，正常情况下，是没有办法前往「开拓」认知外的世界的。
t_en: This is Akivili we're talking about. In the first instance, every one of THEIR stops was a world no human had ever set foot on. The Astral Express has always traveled along the silver rail laid down by Akivili, so we don't normally get to venture into a world beyond the knowledge of the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 但这一次，或许我们有机会在星图上留下一个全新的站点，我也有些摩拳擦掌了。
t_en: But this time, we might just get the chance to add a brand-new stop to the astral charts. I don't mind telling you — I'm a little excited.

t_ch: 未知的世界意味着未知的挑战，我也有些跃跃欲试了。
t_en: An unknown world brings unknown challenges. Exciting stuff.

t_ch: 呵呵，{NICKNAME}，这是你第一次探索星图外的世界吧？
t_en: Ah, {NICKNAME}. This is your first time exploring beyond the astral charts, isn't it?

t_ch: 对我来说没有差别…
t_en: It doesn't feel any different to me...

t_ch: 毕竟就算是星图上标注的世界，也会发生日新月异的变化。
t_en: Worlds that have been mapped on the astral charts also present new surprises from time to time.

t_ch: 大家都是第一次吧？
t_en: Same for everyone else, right?

t_ch: 也许帕姆不是？况且，就算是星图上标注的世界，也会发生日新月异的变化。
t_en: Maybe not for Pom-Pom. And worlds that have been mapped on the astral charts also present new surprises from time to time.

t_ch: 信用点是不是没用了？
t_en: Are credits going to be useless there?

t_ch: 竟然在想这么细节的事？也许你得先考虑下语言问题？
t_en: That's quite the detail to fixate on. Perhaps you should be worrying about language barriers instead?

t_ch: 别担心。以防万一，我还留了个「后备方案」。先卖个关子，等需要时再揭秘吧。
t_en: But we'll be fine. Let's just say I have a backup plan. I'll reveal it when the time comes.

t_ch: 别担心。以防万一，我还留了个「后备方案」。先卖个关子，等需要时再揭秘吧。
t_en: But we'll be fine. Let's just say I have a backup plan. I'll reveal it when the time comes.

t_ch: 这次的目的地，我提供不了什么信息。如果好奇，你可以询问那位忆者。
t_en: I can't provide many details about our destination this time. You can ask the Memokeeper if you want to know more.

t_ch: 丹恒，你会紧张吗？
t_en: Are you nervous, Dan Heng?

t_ch: 怎么突然问这个，你很紧张么？别担心，相信列车组。
t_en: Why do you ask that? Are you feeling nervous yourself? It'll be fine. Just trust the Crew.

t_ch: 这下智库有的补充了。
t_en: Oh ho, the data bank's getting a huge update.

t_ch: 嗯，想来是个大工程，这次我会一起下车。
t_en: Mhm, I suppose there's a lot to do. I'll disembark with all of you this time.

t_ch: 列车头一回迎来这么多客人，有些不习惯。你先去派对车厢吧。待会儿见。
t_en: We've never had this many passengers on board before... I'm still not used to it. Why don't you head to the Party Car first? I'll see you later.

t_ch: 你先去派对车厢吧。待会儿见。
t_en: Why don't you head to the Party Car first? I'll see you later.

t_ch: 哎，你来得正好！我刚才打开相机，不知不觉就看起了以前的照片。
t_en: Hey, great timing! I just turned on my camera and was looking through some old photos.

t_ch: 我问你哦，一段旅途从开始到结束，你最喜欢哪个时候？
t_en: Can I ask you something? What's your favorite part of a journey, from start to finish?

t_ch: 旅程伊始，面对未知的时候…
t_en: The start of a journey, when we dive into the unknown.

t_ch: 那等到了翁法罗斯，咱们一落地就去拍两张吧！
t_en: Then let's go snap some photos as soon as we arrive in Amphoreus!

t_ch: 旅程中途，有所收获的时候…
t_en: The middle of the journey, when some gains are made.

t_ch: 那你可得多提醒我，随时准备好按下快门！
t_en: Then you're going to have to give me a nudge whenever there's something worth snapping!

t_ch: 旅程尾声，想要纪念的时候…
t_en: The end of the journey, when we wanna commemorate the adventure.

t_ch: 咱也是。这次翁法罗斯之旅，可要留下一张大家都满意的合照！
t_en: Me too! This time in Amphoreus let's make sure we get a group photo that everyone loves!

t_ch: 哎呀！不能光顾着聊天了，我还得多准备几块电池，万一落在了特别原始的地方呢？
t_en: Anyway, enough chitchat! I better pack some extra batteries in case we end up somewhere without power!

t_ch: 不闲聊啦，你也快去收拾收拾吧。
t_en: Enough chitchat. You should get packing, too!

t_ch: 看样子，下一站已经决定了？
t_en: Looks like you've decided on your next stop?

t_ch: 是翁法罗斯。
t_en: We're going to Amphoreus.

t_ch: 是洗车星。
t_en: We're going to a Washtopia.

t_ch: 是重返匹诺康尼。
t_en: We're going back to Penacony.

t_ch: 好，我明白了。
t_en: I see.

t_ch: 好平淡的反应。
t_en: You're taking it very calmly.

t_ch: 没什么想说的吗？
t_en: No comment from you?

t_ch: 踏上远行的人，需要的只是「出发」而已。
t_en: Those who embark on a long journey simply need to "set off."

t_ch: 我很期待接下来的旅程。
t_en: I look forward to the journey ahead.

t_ch: 你来啦。听说各位无名客选择了翁法罗斯，十分明智的决定。
t_en: Ah, you're here. I hear the Nameless are going to Amphoreus. A very wise decision.

t_ch: 你听谁说的？
t_en: Who did you hear that from?

t_ch: 我可是忆者。记忆是不会说谎的。
t_en: I am a Memokeeper, after all. Memories don't lie.

t_ch: 你为什么要去翁法罗斯？
t_en: Why do you want to go to Amphoreus?

t_ch: 忆庭为何需要星穹列车的帮助？
t_en: Why is the Garden turning to us for help?

t_ch: 确切地说，这是我个人的请求。
t_en: Truth be told, it's more of a personal request.

t_ch: 你是否听过这么一种说法：「忆者穿行诸界，只为搜集一切珍贵的记忆」。
t_en: "Memokeepers traverse the worlds only to collect precious memories." Have you heard that before?

t_ch: 打捞湮没无闻的「记忆」是我的职责，而忆庭之镜映照出的翁法罗斯…就像橱窗中的珍宝，闪闪发光，也难以触及。
t_en: It's my duty to salvage unknown memories, and the Amphoreus that has been revealed by the Garden's mirror is like a treasure inside a display case — dazzling yet out of reach.

t_ch: 我需要一枚能钉破玻璃的尖钉，也就是各位。只有「开拓」能深入翁法罗斯，穿过层层迷雾，令世界的「记忆」重现天日。
t_en: I need a sharp nail to break through that glass, and that's where you come in. Only through trailblazing can we reach the heart of Amphoreus, cut through the thick mist, and bring the world's "memories" back to light.

t_ch: 你不会让我失望的，对吗？
t_en: I trust you won't disappoint me?

t_ch: 你不会让我失望的，对吗？
t_en: I trust you won't disappoint me?

t_ch: （该收拾些什么好呢？）
t_en: (What should I pack?)

t_ch: 收拾行李，准备跃迁。
t_en: Pack up and get ready to warp.

t_ch: 再和其他人聊聊吧。
t_en: Chat with the others some more.

t_ch: 你思考再三，准备不充分等于充分不准备！索性把行李丢到一边吧……
t_en: After much deliberation, you realize that insufficient preparation is as good as no preparation! Might as well toss your luggage aside...

t_ch: 算了，准备总比不准备好，形式主义也有其必要。
t_en: Never mind. Having some preparation is better than none. Even formalities have their place.

t_ch: （时间差不多咯。去找个位子，看看跃迁风光吧。）
t_en: (Looks like it's about time. I should go find a spot to take in the views during the warp.)

t_ch: 各位乘客请注意——列车即将跃迁——请坐稳扶好帕——！
t_en: Attention, passengers. The Express is about to make the jump. Please be seated and hold on!

t_ch: 看吧，这就是那个与世隔绝，只能被忆庭之镜映照出的世界……
t_en: Here it is — the isolated world that can only be seen through the Garden's mirror...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」</color>。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land, Amphoreus</color>.

t_ch: 好刺眼的光…
t_en: So blindingly bright...

t_ch: 这是什么天体？
t_en: What celestial body is this?

t_ch: 无人知晓，这是你们将要揭示的答案。
t_en: No one knows. That's what you're about to find out.

t_ch: 它怎么突然出现了？
t_en: How did it suddenly just appear?

t_ch: 我施展了一点小魔术，让你们也能看清它的样貌。
t_en: I used a little magic so all of you can also see what it looks like.
Woah. It's in the shape of an "8"!

t_ch: 正如各位所见，翁法罗斯被一团混沌的物质包裹着，难以被外部观测。普通的星际旅行无法意识到它的存在，更遑论经过和到达。
t_en: As you can see, Amphoreus is surrounded by a mass of chaotic matter that conceals it from the outside world — nearly. Conventional interstellar travel can't detect its presence, let alone pass by or land on the planet.

t_ch: 但忆庭窥见了这里，一并发现的，还有其中变幻莫测的命途行迹。
t_en: Yet the Garden, caught a glimpse of this place, and along with it, discovered ever-shifting Traces.

t_ch: 「三重命途交织缠绕着翁法罗斯，共同谱写世界的命运」——按照你的说法，普通的命途行者不会在镜中留下痕迹，所以……
t_en: "Three Paths interweave and fetter Amphoreus, co-authoring the fate of the world." Ordinary Pathstriders aren't known to leave traces in the mirror, so if what you said is true...

t_ch: 在这遗世独立的星系，诞生过至少三位堪比「令使」的存在。
t_en: Then this isolated star system must be home to at least three beings comparable to Emanators.

t_ch: 甚至，可能是星神本人垂迹。
t_en: I would even go as far as to say Aeons THEMSELVES.

t_ch: 如此人杰地灵的世界，在寰宇间却寂寂无名。确实有些奇怪。
t_en: For a world to have nurtured such marvels yet still remain unheard of throughout the cosmos? Now, that is hard to fathom.

t_ch: 先前，我们已经知道了这三重命途的其中一重是「智识」……
t_en: We already know one of the three Paths to be the Erudition...

t_ch: 而第二重——不必向各位隐瞒，就在刚才，你们已亲眼见证了它，是「记忆」。
t_en: I can reveal the second. In fact, you've all seen it just now. It's the Remembrance.

t_ch: 难怪忆庭的使者能揭开它的面纱啊。那，最后一重呢？
t_en: I see. Then it makes sense that a messenger of the Garden would be capable of unveiling Amphoreus for us. What about the final Path?

t_ch: 很遗憾，命运吝啬于展现它的底色，我也不知道第三重命途是什么。
t_en: Unfortunately, fate is keeping the third Path a mystery. I don't know what it is, either.

t_ch: 它潜藏在「智识」和「记忆」的光芒下，与二者分庭抗礼。是「均衡」？「神秘」？还是「不朽」？我没有头绪。
t_en: Hidden beneath the brilliance of Erudition and Remembrance, yet possessing enough power to rival the other two Paths. It could be the Equilibrium, the Enigmata, or perhaps the Permanence? I have no clue at all.

t_ch: 这条缠绕翁法罗斯的白色光带，也许就是三重命途彼此交织的结果。也只有各位「开拓」的行者能深入漩涡中心，看清它的容貌。
t_en: This white ribbon of light encircling Amphoreus might very well be a product of the three interwoven Paths. Only when Pathstriders of the Trailblaze enter the center of the vortex will its true nature be revealed.

t_ch: 话虽如此，情报还是太少了。
t_en: Still, we know far too little about the planet.

t_ch: 更实际的问题是，现在没法进行降落选址。等待我们的可能是大海、没有氧气的真空带、甚至火山岩浆……
t_en: What's more pressing is finding a suitable landing site. We could end up over an ocean, in a vacuum without oxygen, or worse yet, in the middle of a lava field...

t_ch: 终于知道了智库的重要性。
t_en: Now I see why the data bank's important.

t_ch: 是啊。不过，总得面对智库记录外的世界的。
t_en: It is. Still, encountering worlds that exist which are not recorded in the data bank is unavoidable.

t_ch: 不用担心，我的命比较硬！
t_en: Have no fear, resilient little me will volunteer!

t_ch: 知道你不畏生死，但别冲动，大伙都挺珍惜你的。
t_en: I know you're fearless even in the face of death, but don't act recklessly. Everyone values you.

t_ch: 返航！下一站，露莎卡星！
t_en: We're turning back! Next stop: Lushaka!

t_ch: 这就推翻了之前所有的结论，还不至于。
t_en: Throwing in the towel already? I don't think we're at that point yet.

t_ch: 看来有人已经准备好下车，跃跃欲试了。
t_en: Looks like someone is all set and itching to get off the train.

t_ch: …等会儿，是不是少了个人？
t_en: ...Wait, I think we might be missing someone.

t_ch: 咦，三月七呢？
t_en: Hey, where's March 7th?

t_ch: 我也想说，吐槽的人没了。
t_en: Yeah, I was wondering where that chatterbox had gone.

t_ch: 谁？列车组四个人都在啊。
t_en: Really? Who? All four of us are here.

t_ch: 我没开玩笑，三月七呢？
t_en: Very funny... But seriously, where's March 7th?

t_ch: 记得出发前，她说要鼓捣相机就回了房间。之后一直没见她出来。
t_en: She said something about her camera before going back to her room. I haven't seen her since the warp.

t_ch: 奇怪。按理说，小三月应该是最兴奋的那个，怎么今天一反常态？去她房间看看吧。
t_en: That's not like March. She's usually the most excited about expeditions. Let's drop by her room.

t_ch: 我有种…奇怪的预感。各位先去吧，我稍后就来。
t_en: Something feels... off. Please, all of you go ahead without me. I'll join you later.

t_ch: 如果需要帮助，请随时叫我。我会尽到一位乘客的义务。
t_en: Let me know if there's anything I can assist with. I'll do whatever I can.

t_ch: 小三月，你在房间里吗？
t_en: March, are you in here?

t_ch: 我…在……
t_en: Yeah...

t_ch: 抱歉，不知怎的…跃迁结束后，就使不上力了……
t_en: Sorry, guys. I don't know what's wrong... I just feel really weak after the warp...

t_ch: 你生病了？
t_en: Did you come down with something?

t_ch: 不会吧，美少女怎么会生病呢……
t_en: I doubt it...? Pretty girls aren't supposed to get sick...

t_ch: 你晕车了？
t_en: Is it motion sickness?

t_ch: 才没有…我跃迁的次数比你多多了……
t_en: Of course not! I've been through way more jumps than you ever have!

t_ch: 鬼…压床了？
t_en: Are you... possessed?

t_ch: 我都这样了…你就别吓人了……
t_en: Have a heart, will you? Stop scaring me...

t_ch: 黑天鹅小姐，能麻烦你探查一下房间里的「记忆」吗？
t_en: Miss Black Swan, could you take a look at the memories in this room?

t_ch: 交给我吧。
t_en: Gladly.

t_ch: 黑天鹅将额头抵在三月七的脑袋上，像是在感受她的体温……
t_en: Black Swan presses her forehead against March 7th's head, as if feeling the latter's body temperature...

t_ch: …从三月七的记忆来看，她突然变得十分虚弱，像是被什么东西压住了身体，变化发生在一瞬间，应该不是病理因素。
t_en: ...I'm seeing March 7th hit by a sudden bout of weakness in her memories, as if something was weighing on her. The onset of it far too quick to be any kind of sickness.

t_ch: 或许是外部环境的影响？
t_en: Perhaps it's the effect of some external stimulus?

t_ch: 哎哟！怎么人全来了，早知道先把房间收拾一遍了……
t_en: Ahh, why is everyone here!? I should've cleaned my room...

t_ch: 星期日自幼在忆质充盈的星系长大，擅长精神治疗，我请他也来做些诊断。
t_en: I invited Sunday to help with the diagnosis. He grew up in a star system rich in memoria. When it comes to mental healing, he's quite the specialist.

t_ch: 列位去过匹诺康尼，应当知晓在跃迁至阿斯德纳时，一些人会陷入联觉梦境。
t_en: You've all been to Penacony before. I presume you are aware of how some might find themselves in a Synesthesia Dreamscape after warping to Asdana.

t_ch: 我想此刻也是同理。三月小姐受到了某种来自外部的影响，可能是来自命途、星神…或是翁法罗斯本身。
t_en: I'm guessing this is something similar. Miss March appears to be affected by a certain external stimulus, perhaps a Path, an Aeon, or even... Amphoreus itself.

t_ch: 我也这么认为。
t_en: I agree. That's likely the case.

t_ch: 为什么只有她受到了影响？
t_en: Why is she the only one affected?

t_ch: 具体不得而知，可能只是时间早晚。
t_en: There's no way to tell at this point. It could just be a matter of time before everyone feels unwell.

t_ch: 不过，在查明原因前，我建议三月七小姐不要贸然接近翁法罗斯。
t_en: Before we identify the cause, my suggestion is for Miss March to avoid venturing anywhere near Amphoreus.

t_ch: 没事的，姬子，我很乖的。大家先出发吧，等我恢复了，立刻就追上你们……
t_en: It's okay, Himeko. I'll be good on my own. Go ahead, guys! I'll catch up once I feel better...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这个给你，把我的相机带上！说好落地要拍照的，这下只能拜托你啦……
t_en: Here, {NICKNAME}. Take my camera along! I was planning to take photos when we got there, but looks like you'll have to help me with that now...

t_ch: 放心交给我吧。
t_en: Leave it to me.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，知道你靠得住。
t_en: Heh, I know I can always count on you.

t_ch: 别，我不要留下你一个人…
t_en: Nooo, how could I leave you by yourself...?

t_ch: 哇，怎么还演上煽情戏了…多大点事，别怕。
t_en: Haha, what's with the melodramatic turn... I'll be fine.

t_ch: 三二一，茄子——
t_en: Three, two, one... Cheeeese—!

t_ch: 别——头发都没梳呢。省着点电吧……
t_en: No—! Not when my hair's messy. And don't drain the camera's battery now...

t_ch: 各位，让三月七好好休息吧。我们去外面说话。
t_en: Why don't we take our discussion outside so March 7th can rest?

t_ch: 去吧去吧。别担心，下次见面，咱就变回那个活蹦乱跳的美少女了。记得多拍些照片啊，我会检查作业的！
t_en: Yeah, you guys go on ahead. Don't worry about me! I'll be back to being my hyperactive and adorable self by the next time you see me. Now don't forget about those photos, okay? I'll be checking the camera!

t_ch: 对啦，有句话忘说了。看着以前的照片，咱忽然意识到一件事。无论是雅利洛-VI、仙舟还是匹诺康尼……
t_en: Oh, I almost forgot. I was looking at the photos from before when I realized something. When we were on Jarilo-VI, the Xianzhou, and Penacony...

t_ch: 咱们遇见的第一个当地人，肯定藏着不得了的大秘密！
t_en: The first local we met in each of those worlds all harbored their own deep secret! I'm sure it'll be the same on Amphoreus.

t_ch: 这次本姑娘没法跟着，你们可千万要留心啊……
t_en: I can't join you guys this time, but make sure to always look out for one another, okay...?

t_ch: 你觉得翁法罗斯会和三月七的过去有关吗？
t_en: Do you think March 7th's past could be connected to Amphoreus?

t_ch: 不至于这么巧，我没见到任何和「六相冰」有关的线索。更有可能是翁法罗斯的某种力量率先在她身上显现了。
t_en: No, that'd be too much of a coincidence. I haven't seen anything related to Six-Phased Ice yet. It's more likely that some kind of energy on Amphoreus affected her before any of us.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这趟「开拓」之旅，我想交给你和丹恒打头阵，可以吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I want you and Dan Heng to take the lead in this trailblazing expedition. Are you up for it?

t_ch: 没问题，我俩配合默契。
t_en: Sure, we work well together.

t_ch: 经历了匹诺康尼之行，{NICKNAME}也是成熟的无名客了。
t_en: I see our adventure in Penacony has helped {NICKNAME} grow into an experienced Nameless.

t_ch: 感觉人手不太够啊…
t_en: Pretty sure we're going to need more help...

t_ch: 放心吧，通常都能在当地找到值得信赖的伙伴。
t_en: Not to worry, we have a knack for finding trustworthy friends wherever we go.

t_ch: 那剩下的人呢？
t_en: What about the rest of you?

t_ch: 翁法罗斯这一站意义特殊，车上的每位乘客都不可或缺。开荒世界的工作交给年轻人正合适，相信你和丹恒能成为彼此的照应。
t_en: Amphoreus is a crucial stop, so everyone on the Express has been roped in to help in some way or another. Venturing into the unknown world is a task perfect for you youngsters. I'm sure you'll both have each other's backs.
